ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Provider ID of the hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital */,
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ownership type */,
  "hospital_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_ownership_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ownership_type_id") REFERENCES ownership_types ("ownership_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_hospital_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_type_id") REFERENCES hospital_types ("hospital_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_types" (
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership type */,
  "ownership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital being rated */,
  "mortality_national_comparison" TEXT /* Mortality national comparison rating */,
  "safety_of_care_national_comparison" TEXT /* Safety of care national comparison rating */,
  "readmission_national_comparison" TEXT /* Readmission national comparison rating */,
  "patient_experience_national_comparison" TEXT /* Patient experience national comparison rating */,
  "effectiveness_of_care_national_comparison" TEXT /* Effectiveness of care national comparison rating */,
  "timeliness_of_care_national_comparison" TEXT /* Timeliness of care national comparison rating */,
  "efficient_use_of_medical_imaging_national_comparison" TEXT /* Efficient use of medical imaging national comparison rating */,
  "hospital_overall_rating" TEXT /* Hospital overall rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_referral_regions" (
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital referral region */,
  "hrr_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital referral region */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital in the referral region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction rating */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital being rated */,
  "satisfaction_rating" TEXT /* Patient satisfaction rating */,
  "satisfaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the satisfaction rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readmission_rates" (
  "readmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readmission rate */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "readmission_rate" REAL /* Readmission rate */,
  "readmission_date" TEXT /* Date of the readmission rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the hospital data */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_types" (
  "hospital_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital type */,
  "hospital_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
